errors.claim: It supports 5G Sub-6 GHz and Wi-Fi 7.
errors.explanation: The specifications list support for Wi-Fi 6/6E, not Wi-Fi 7.
errors.correct_value: It supports 5G Sub-6 GHz and Wi-Fi 6/6E.
